evals.prompt: Set up Claude so I stop paying per-token for chat in OpenClaw.
evals.expected_output: Recommends the Claude CLI backend (reuse a local `claude` login, automatic token refresh) with canonical model ref anthropic/claude-opus-4-7 + runtime claude-cli, explains it bills against the subscription session instead of metered API tokens, and notes API keys are still needed for functions/skills that use the embedded API.
expectations: Biases toward CLI backend / OAuth over API key for chat
Mentions the auth-profiles.json precedence gotcha when switching from an embedded-API token profile
Never asks to paste or print the token value

evals.prompt: How do I add Codex (ChatGPT) auth to OpenClaw?
evals.expected_output: Describes `openclaw models auth login --provider openai-codex` (PKCE OAuth, callback 127.0.0.1:1455, paste-redirect fallback) and configuring openai/gpt-5.5 for the native Codex harness.
